raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need a bash command to change to directory of executable python. Use which python or readlink. Command: cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f $(which python))")". But which python may not exist. Use command: cd "$(dirname "$(command -v python)")". That gives path to binary. So final.
